_comment: CCI ref/encl invalid fixture: References are not in body-appearance order. Ref (b) is cited first in body, but ref list orders (a) before (b).
body: 1. Per reference (b), OPNAVINST 5216.5 Correspondence Instructions, administrative procedures must be reviewed annually.
2. Per reference (a), SECNAV Manual 5216.5 Correspondence Manual, all units shall comply with established correspondence standards.
